title: [release-1.11] Update to c/image 5.24.1
body:
... to include an unexpected EOF workaround.

(I have also created the `release-1.11` branch.)

comments.body: My first instinct is to wait for a coordinated update / vendor dance, if there will be one. But I don’t really care at all, there are enough integers to make another release afterwards if necessary.
